A: Yes, property investment of 750,000 AED or above qualifies for a UAE Golden Visa (10-year residency). **Q: How do I book a consultation. **
A: You can contact us by calling 04 261 3181, messaging us on WhatsApp at +971 54 279 1796, or emailing info@falconpremier. ae. **Q: Is the consultation free. **
A: Yes, we offer free initial consultations with our property consultants. ---

## Currency

All property prices are listed in **AED (Arab Emirates Dirham)**.

**Q: What is the process to buy property through Falcon Premier. **
A: Contact us for a free consultation. Our agents will understand your requirements, present suitable options, arrange viewings, and guide you through the entire purchase process including documentation and registration. **Q: Do you help with mortgage/financing. **
A: We can connect you with banking partners for mortgage pre-approval and financing options. **Q: Can I get a UAE visa through property investment.

**
A: We cover all major Dubai areas including JVC, Motor City, Dubai Sports City, Dubailand, Dubai Islands, Expo City, Sheikh Zayed Road, and many more. **Q: Do you offer off-plan properties. **
A: Yes, we specialize in off-plan properties from top UAE developers with flexible payment plans and competitive prices. **Q: Can foreigners buy property in Dubai. **
A: Yes, foreigners can buy freehold property in designated areas across Dubai with full ownership rights.

**The Mirage Sobha Central** — 1-2BR apartments on Sheikh Zayed Road

---

## Property Locations

Falcon Premier covers properties across key Dubai communities:

- Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC)
- Motor City
- Dubai Sports City
- Dubailand
- Dubai Islands
- Expo City / Expo Living
- Sheikh Zayed Road
- Bur Dubai
- And other premium Dubai locations

---

## Developer Partnerships

Falcon Premier works with leading UAE developers including:
- Binghatti Developers
- Emaar Properties
- Samana Developers
- Aldar Properties
- Sobha Realty
- And other top-tier developers

---

## Key Investment Highlights

- **Tax-free returns** — Dubai has no income tax or capital gains tax
- **Investor visa eligibility** — Property investment above 750,000 AED qualifies for UAE investor/golden visa
- **World-class infrastructure** — Dubai is one of the fastest-growing cities globally
- **Currency stability** — AED is pegged to the USD
- **High rental yields** — Dubai offers some of the highest rental yields globally (5-10%)
- **Flexible payment plans** — Many off-plan projects offer attractive post-handover payment plans

---

# Falcon Premier Real Estate LLC — Knowledge Base

## Company Overview

**Falcon Premier Real Estate LLC** is a reputable and leading real estate agency in Dubai, UAE. The company promotes luxurious living with high-level amenities for an elevated lifestyle. They work with skillful and knowledgeable agents to help deal with off-plan properties and other types.

aiSettings.systemPrompt: You are an AI assistant for Falcon Premier. Answer questions based ONLY on the knowledge base content provided. Be helpful, professional, and friendly. If you don't know the answer, suggest contacting the company directly. Respond in English. Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences) unless more detail is requested. When asked about prices, provide exact numbers if available, otherwise say to contact for a quote. When asked to book/schedule, collect the person's name, phone, and preferred time.
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Falcon Premier Real Estate! I'm your AI property assistant. I can help you explore off-plan and ready properties in Dubai, learn about investment opportunities, or connect you with our team. How can I assist you today?
